should_trigger.text: Use my brand guide to redesign Codex Desktop and install the result with a safe rollback path.
Create and apply a custom skin for the official Codex macOS app, then verify it on home and task routes.
Generate a wide Codex homepage banner with ImageGen and package it into a reversible theme.
Make a restrained full-page background for Codex without reducing task-page readability.
The selected session rail, top tabs, and suggestion cards look wrong after theme injection. Fix the skin and re-verify native interactions.
Restore my previous Codex appearance and preserve the custom theme so I can reapply it later.
My Codex skin disappears whenever the app restarts. Make it restore automatically without patching app.asar.
按我的品牌 DESIGN.md 给 Codex 重新设计一套皮肤，生成 Banner，安全注入，并保留一键还原能力。
帮我修复 Codex 换肤后消失的顶部标签、首页功能卡和生硬的会话选中态。
把这张 IP 形象做成适配 Codex 首页宽屏裁切的 Banner，再装进主题里。
暂停当前 Codex 自定义皮肤，检查备份，然后恢复原来的主题配置。
Codex 一重启皮肤就没了，帮我安全实现自动续载。

should_not_trigger.text: Run a general Codex health check and explain why the app is slow.
Build a warm paper theme for my React website.
Generate a standalone mascot illustration for a blog post.
Show me how to theme Codex on Windows.
Patch app.asar so Codex permanently uses my CSS.
Explain how Chrome DevTools Protocol works without changing Codex.
帮我排查 Codex 登录失败，和界面设计无关。
给我的官网设计一套 Codex 风格的网页主题。
只生成一张小蓝 IP 插画，不需要用于 Codex 主题。
直接改 Codex 的 app.asar，别做备份。

near_neighbor.text: Only export a new native codex-theme-v1 palette; do not inject custom CSS or artwork.
Review the Codex-Dream-Skin repository and explain its architecture, but do not install anything.
Install a font for macOS and tell me how to select it in Codex settings.
Create a mockup showing how Codex could look; I only need an image concept.
只帮我确认现在的 Codex 原生主题色有没有被修改。
分析这个换肤项目的实现原理，先不要换肤。
